params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, AccountId, Account.Name, RecordType.Name, dateTimestampContractreceived__c, Winback_Pilot__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsWon = true AND dateTimestampContractreceived__c = THIS_QUARTER AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) ORDER BY OwnerId, dateTimestampContractreceived__c DESC LIMIT 2000

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, AccountId, Account.Name, RecordType.Name, dateTimestampContractreceived__c, Winback_Pilot__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsWon = true AND dateTimestampContractreceived__c = THIS_QUARTER AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) ORDER BY OwnerId, dateTimestampContractreceived__c DESC LIMIT 2000
